description: Tasks rewritten to match actual generated data

tasks.instruction: Register for a beginner-level weekend evening workshop happening next calendar month that starts at or after 5:00 PM and costs under $40.
tasks.name: Register for a beginner-level weekend evening workshop happening next calendar month that starts at or after 5:00 PM and costs under $40.

tasks.instruction: Join an annual membership plan priced at or below $120 that includes exhibit participation and has the highest number of listed benefits among those options.
tasks.name: Join an annual membership plan priced at or below $120 that includes exhibit participation and has the highest number of listed benefits among those options.
tasks.description: Join an annual membership plan priced at or below $120 that includes exhibit participation and has the highest number of listed benefits among those options.

tasks.instruction: Within the current month, add one lecture-style event, one photo walk, and one critique-style event, each costing $20 or less, to your schedule and then sort your scheduled events by date in ascending order.
tasks.name: Within the current month, add one lecture-style event, one photo walk, and one critique-style event, each costing $20 or less, to your schedule and then sort your scheduled events by date in ascending order.

tasks.instruction: Favorite four gallery photos tagged “Night” that are located in “Downtown” with a rating of at least 4 stars, and organize them into a collection named “Night Downtown.”

tasks.instruction: From beginner-level gear guides published within the last 12 months, add three different camera models priced at $600 or less to your on-site gear wishlist.

tasks.instruction: Create a forum account and start a new topic in the gear section asking for tripod recommendations under $150 for landscape photography, writing at least two sentences in the post.

tasks.instruction: Find the recurring weekly general meeting that starts at or after 6:30 PM, save its details to a personal note including its full address and an instruction to arrive 15 minutes early, then rename the note.

tasks.instruction: In the multi-week courses section, filter to classes costing $200 or less and lasting at least 3 weeks, compare the first two upcoming options, and reserve a spot in the one that offers more sessions.

tasks.instruction: Sign up for the club’s newsletter with a monthly frequency, select only the topics for landscape, portraits, and street photography (excluding administration-related topics), choose a highlights-only format, and set your communication preferences to a monthly summary.

tasks.instruction: Using the mentorship directory, contact the highest-rated wildlife photography mentor who is currently accepting beginners and send a detailed mentorship request message of at least three sentences.
